title: UpdateScreenTypes
description: The IDs of the screens for the screen types of the screen scheme.

create.description: The ID of the create screen. To remove the screen association, pass a null.

default.description: The ID of the default screen. When specified, must include a screen ID as a default screen is required.

edit.description: The ID of the edit screen. To remove the screen association, pass a null.

view.description: The ID of the view screen. To remove the screen association, pass a null.
